{"problem_standardized_math":"Let $v:\\mathbf{R}^n \\to \\mathbf{R}^m$ be a smooth vector-valued function. Consider the unconstrained optimization problems of minimizing $f(x)$ in the two cases\n\\[\nf(x)=\\|v(x)\\|_{\\infty}, \\qquad f(x)=\\max_{i=1,2,\\ldots,m} v_i(x).\n\\]\nReformulate each of these generally nonsmooth optimization problems as a smooth constrained optimization problem."}
